creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to bsd from comment #6)
I'm not surprised to hear this. I was unhappy
with the version "lock in". But the package
framework insisted I use those 2 Includes to
give me a pass on the changes.
In the end, it makes no sense to insist on
openldap in all configurations. Even less
to lock it at 2.6.
I'll change the maintainer+ accordingly.
